title: Proxmox Repository Hygiene
summary: Student validates Proxmox repository configuration and removes incorrect enterprise repository errors where appropriate.
student_goal: Review Proxmox apt repository configuration and confirm the system uses the intended repositories.

required_evidence.label: APT update error
required_evidence.description: Student must show the repository-related apt error, if present.

required_evidence.label: Repository source files
required_evidence.description: Student must identify relevant files under apt sources configuration.

required_evidence.label: Successful apt update
required_evidence.description: Student must confirm apt update works after correction.

opening_questions: Which Proxmox repository files are enabled?
Is this a subscription or no-subscription lab system?
completion_signals: apt update completes without enterprise repository error
mentor_guidance_rules: Do not remove repositories without confirming lab subscription context.
Ask for repo file evidence before recommending edits.
Require successful apt update output for completion.
